info.name: Language Switcher
info.summary: Adds a language switcher to the Nextcloud header for both authenticated and public pages
info.description:
This app provides a language switcher dropdown in the Nextcloud top navigation bar.
- For authenticated users: changes the user's language preference - For public/anonymous users (e.g. shared links): sets a cookie that overrides the browser's Accept-Language header
Works with Nextcloud 27 and above.
info.author: aarekraft.dev
